$comment: Test cases for the nightly Kody engine smoke suite. Each case runs a single CLI invocation and asserts on exit code + stdout/stderr substrings. Add new cases by appending to `tests`. Do NOT add cases that require live GitHub state (PRs, issues) — those go in a separate, slower suite.

tests.name: cli.help.no-args
tests.describe: Engine prints CLI usage when invoked with no args (outside CI env vars).

tests.name: cli.help.flag
tests.describe: Engine prints CLI usage for --help flag.

tests.name: cli.version.command
tests.describe: `kody version` prints a semver-shaped string and exits 0.

tests.name: cli.version.flag
tests.describe: `kody --version` prints a semver-shaped string and exits 0.

tests.name: cli.unknown.command
tests.describe: Unknown top-level command exits non-zero with a clear error.

tests.name: cmd.run.missing-flag
tests.describe: `kody run` without --issue surfaces a clear validation error and exits non-zero (validates the run profile loads).

tests.name: cmd.fix.missing-flag
tests.describe: `kody fix` without --pr surfaces a clear validation error (validates the fix profile loads).

tests.name: cmd.fix-ci.missing-flag
tests.describe: `kody fix-ci` without --pr surfaces a clear validation error (validates the fix-ci profile loads).

tests.name: cmd.resolve.missing-flag
tests.describe: `kody resolve` without --pr surfaces a clear validation error (validates the resolve profile loads).

tests.name: cmd.review.missing-flag
tests.describe: `kody review` without --pr surfaces a clear validation error (validates the review profile loads).

tests.name: cmd.plan.missing-flag
tests.describe: `kody plan` without --issue surfaces a clear validation error (validates the plan profile loads).

tests.name: cmd.classify.missing-flag
tests.describe: `kody classify` without --issue surfaces a clear validation error (validates the classify profile loads).

tests.name: cmd.spec.missing-flag
tests.describe: `kody spec` without --issue surfaces a clear validation error (validates the spec profile loads).

tests.name: cmd.research.missing-flag
tests.describe: `kody research` without --issue surfaces a clear validation error (validates the research profile loads).

tests.name: cmd.sync.profile-loads
tests.describe: `kody sync` invokes the sync profile (no required flags). Acceptable outcome: exits 0 (already in sync) or non-zero with a recognized sync-side error message — but NOT a profile-load crash.

tests.name: cmd.init.profile-loads
tests.describe: `kody init` runs the init profile end-to-end on a synthetic empty cwd. Should exit cleanly without a profile-load crash.

tests.name: cmd.watch-stale-prs.profile-loads
tests.describe: `kody watch-stale-prs` profile loads and starts (one-shot scan). Acceptable outcome: any exit code so long as it isn't a profile-load crash.

tests.name: cmd.mission-scheduler.profile-loads
tests.describe: `kody mission-scheduler` runs one tick (no missions in this repo's .kody/missions = no-op). Validates the new file-based dispatcher is wired.

tests.name: cmd.mission-tick.missing-flag
tests.describe: `kody mission-tick` without --mission surfaces a clear validation error.

tests.name: cmd.bug.profile-loads
tests.describe: `kody bug` (a comment-dispatched alias) prints help / errors cleanly without crashing.

tests.name: cmd.feature.profile-loads
tests.describe: `kody feature` profile loads.

tests.name: cmd.chore.profile-loads
tests.describe: `kody chore` profile loads.

tests.name: cmd.ui-review.missing-flag
tests.describe: `kody ui-review` without --pr surfaces a validation error (profile loads).

tests.name: cmd.release.profile-loads
tests.describe: `kody release` profile loads. Release workflows are typically only invoked from CI; we just verify it doesn't crash on profile load.

tests.name: config.validates
tests.describe: Engine accepts the consumer repo's kody.config.json without complaint when running a no-op-style invocation.
